steps.title: Compare the methods
steps.content: Taylor's team concluded that spray coating could improve power conversion efficiency. The strongest graph evidence would compare spray coating directly with spin coating and show spray-coated ETLs performing better across the tested thicknesses, not just at one isolated point or merely within the spray-coated group at any tested ETL thickness.

steps.title: Remove weaker data
steps.content: A only says both methods exceed 10 percent at their lowest points, which does not show spray coating is better. C reports values that do not match the graph and understates the spray-coated result. D describes variation within spray coating alone, not an advantage over spin coating. The answer is B.
